THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEISS JULIE ANNE CAIAZZO CHRISTIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COSTENBADER JOHN L. $687.00 PRINCIPAL, $64.64 INTEREST, $25.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $776.64 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
